phases.name: python-oracle-verify
phases.description: verify Python oracle matches frozen fixtures (cross-language)
phases.on_fail: emit state diff per run; exit 1

phases.name: oracle-staleness-check
phases.description: detect if oracle fixtures need regeneration after code changes
phases.on_fail: exit 1 with diff output; fix: python -m src.oracle_generator && commit

phases.name: token-extractor-shadow
phases.description: NON-BLOCKING: bisimulation baseline between grep sensor and f0.5 token extractor. Runs in shadow mode — never gates CI. Output is telemetry only. When shadow passes 100% across N commits, Phase 1 may be upgraded to AST-based enforcement.
phases.migration_gate: flip gating=True only after: (a) 100% equivalence over spatial_vm_fixtures corpus, (b) toolchain version pinned in CI, (c) ROLE_REGISTRY.extractor_version bumped

failure_propagation.phase_1_fail: structural impossibility — fix before any execution
failure_propagation.phase_2_fail: compilation error — fix before behavioral testing
failure_propagation.phase_3_fail: behavioral divergence — ReplayHarnessDiff shows first-failing event
failure_propagation.phase_4_fail: cross-language divergence — Python oracle and Swift diverged
failure_propagation.phase_5_fail: fixture staleness — regenerate oracle and commit

deterministic_log_format.gate_pass: ✅ DSVM-0 CI gate passed: N runs, deterministic equality verified

xcode_build_phase_order: 4. Run Script: swift test --filter ReplayHarnessTests (optional post-build)
github_actions_jobs: Phases 2-3 run inside Xcode build system
